overall_justification: The newspaper edition mentions the "Caixa de Conversão" only briefly in a news section, in the context of a meeting between General Pinheiro Machado and Dr. Jorge Tibiriçá.  The text simply states they conferred on matters of importance, including the "Caixa de Conversão" project. No arguments for or against the Caixa are presented, nor is there any discernible editorial framing. The primary focus of the edition is on other news items.

supporting_evidence.quote: Ao que parece: SS. EExs. tralaram lambem «Io projeeto ila 'Caixa dc Conversãi>.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This is the only mention of the "Caixa de Conversão" in the entire edition and provides no arguments or opinions about it.
